description: Links products to their suppliers with pricing and lead time details.

chunks.text:
TABLE: product_suppliers

DESCRIPTION: Links products to their suppliers with pricing and lead time details.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: product suppliers, supplier products, sourcing, procurement, product sourcing

PRIMARY_KEY: product_supplier_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: product_id → products.product_id, supplier_id → suppliers.supplier_id

COLUMNS: product_supplier_id, product_id, supplier_id, cost_price, lead_time_days, minimum_order_quantity, is_primary_supplier, last_order_date

USE_CASES: Supplier analysis, cost price lookup, primary supplier identification, lead time
